sourcingNote: Hex colors confirmed from official SVG logo. Pantone confirmed by logo slick.
description: The Chicago Cubs are one of the oldest and most beloved franchises in Major League Baseball, founded in 1876 and based in Chicago, Illinois. They play at Wrigley Field, one of the most iconic ballparks in baseball, and compete in the NL Central. The Cubs famously ended a 108-year championship drought by winning the 2016 World Series.
